steps.title: Original price equation
steps.content: The variables represent original prices: $m$ is the mirror's original price and $v$ is the vase's original price. Since the two original prices total \$60, the first equation is $$m + v = 60$$

steps.title: Sale price equation
steps.content:
After discounts, the customer pays:
  • Mirror (25% discount): customer pays 100% - 25% = 75% of original = $0.75m$
  • Vase (45% discount): customer pays 100% - 45% = 55% of original = $0.55v$
Combined sale price is \$39: $$0.75m + 0.55v = 39$$
That confirms C is correct.
